title: Max Enchant X
description: Sets the default maximum level for most enchantments to 10.
body:
This mod sets the default maximum level for most enchantments to 10. This also unlocks Mending, Soul Speed, and Swift Sneak.

Such as Efficiency, Fire Aspect, Frost Walker, Impaling, Knockback, Looting, Loyalty, Lure, Piercing, Power, Protection, Respiration, Riptide, Sharpness, Soul Speed, Sweeping Edge, Swift Sneak, Thorns, and Unbreaking.

Maximum can be changed in the config file.

 

Fabric version requires Fabric API!


NeoForge version requires NeoForge.



changelog:

v1.0:

Initial release

 

v1.1:

Fabric: Mixins are now listed in "mixin" instead of "client", License changed to MIT

Forge: Added config

 

v1.2:

Fabric: Updated to 1.20.X,  Added Config, Added Luck

Forge: updated to 1.20.X, fixed config, looting now says fortune/looting/luck

 

v1.3:

Fabric:  added extra enchantment level translations

Forge:  added extra enchantment level translations

NeoForge: Support added, added extra enchantment level translations
